parts.label: Air Filter Box / Airbox (x2, one per bank)
parts.function: Houses the air filter elements for each bank, channeling ambient air into the induction system.

parts.label: Air Filters (x2)
parts.function: Filters particulates from incoming air before it reaches the throttle bodies and combustion chambers.

parts.label: Intake Ducts / Snorkel Tubes (x2)
parts.function: Routes fresh air from the engine bay inlets into each airbox housing.

parts.label: Mass Airflow Sensors / MAF (x2)
parts.function: Measures the mass of air entering each bank using a hot-wire element so the DME can calculate the correct fuel delivery.

parts.label: Throttle Body (x2, one per bank)
parts.function: Regulates airflow into each intake manifold via a drive-by-wire butterfly valve controlled by the DME.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Bank 1 (Variable Geometry)
parts.function: Distributes air to the three Bank 1 cylinders using variable-length runners that optimise torque across the rev range.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Bank 2 (Variable Geometry)
parts.function: Distributes air to the three Bank 2 cylinders using variable-length runners that optimise torque across the rev range.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Resonance / Tuning Flap Actuator (x2)
parts.function: Electrically switches intake runner length at approximately 3500 rpm to maximise induction resonance and mid-range torque.

parts.label: Intake Air Temperature Sensors (x2)
parts.function: Monitors intake air temperature, typically integrated into the MAF sensor housing, so the DME can correct fuel and ignition timing for air density.

parts.label: Crankcase Breather / PCV Valve and Hoses
parts.function: Returns crankcase blow-by gases back to the intake pre-filter to reduce emissions and maintain crankcase vacuum.

parts.label: Airbox-to-Throttle Body Duct, Bank 1
parts.function: Sealed flexible tube conveying metered air from the Bank 1 airbox outlet and MAF sensor directly to the Bank 1 throttle body inlet.

parts.label: Airbox-to-Throttle Body Duct, Bank 2
parts.function: Sealed flexible tube conveying metered air from the Bank 2 airbox outlet and MAF sensor directly to the Bank 2 throttle body inlet.

parts.label: Throttle Body Adapter / Flange, Bank 1
parts.function: Bolted adapter coupling the Bank 1 throttle body flange to the intake manifold, providing a gas-tight transition and accommodating minor axis misalignment.

parts.label: Throttle Body, Bank 2
parts.function: Regulates airflow into the Bank 2 (A122) intake manifold via a drive-by-wire butterfly valve controlled by the DME.

parts.label: Resonance Flap Vacuum / Actuator Unit
parts.function: Vacuum-operated actuator that drives the resonance butterfly valves within the intake manifolds, controlled by the DME via a solenoid to switch runner length.

parts.label: MAP / Boost Pressure Sensor
parts.function: Measures absolute pressure in the intake manifold so the DME can calculate air mass via the speed-density method and verify MAF sensor plausibility.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Pressure Sensor (Absolute)
parts.function: Secondary manifold-absolute-pressure sensor fitted to the intake air distributor; supports load-detection redundancy and variable-runner position feedback.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Temperature Sensor (Charge Air)
parts.function: Monitors air temperature immediately downstream of the throttle body at the manifold port; input to DME charge-temperature compensation.

parts.label: Crankcase Ventilation Secondary Line
parts.function: Secondary hose routing crankcase gases to the intake pre-filter side, completing the closed-loop ventilation circuit.

parts.label: Air Filter Element (Panel Filter, x2)
parts.function: Replaceable filter media insert within the airbox that traps dust and debris, serviced independently of the housing.

parts.label: Air Guide / Deflector
parts.function: Directs airflow within the engine bay toward the airbox inlets to ensure a steady supply of cool ambient air.

parts.label: Oil Separator (Crankcase Ventilation)
parts.function: Separates oil mist from crankcase blow-by gases before they are returned to the intake system, preventing oil contamination of the intake tract.

parts.label: Intake Manifold Rubber Sleeve / Connector Boot (x2)
parts.function: Flexible rubber coupling between the throttle body and intake manifold that absorbs vibration and seals the air path.

parts.label: Intake Air Distributor Seal
parts.function: Seals the mating face between the intake air distributor and the cylinder head to prevent unmetered air ingress.

parts.label: Airbox Mounting Grommet / Rubber Buffer
parts.function: Anti-vibration rubber grommet isolating the airbox from the engine bay structure to suppress noise transmission and protect the housing from stress cracking.

parts.label: Ram Air / Intake Snorkel Duct (x2)
parts.function: External-facing inlet snorkel directing ram-pressure ambient air from the rear quarter cooling vents into the airbox inlet; improves volumetric efficiency at speed.

parts.label: MAF Sensor Housing / Measurement Tube (x2)
parts.function: Precision-bore connecting piece that cradles the hot-film MAF sensing element between the airbox outlet and the intake duct, ensuring laminar flow past the sensor wire.
